ground_truth:
App: **Jan** (v0.8.2). **Three columns**: left nav sidebar + middle settings-category column (e.g. Appearance/Assistants-style entries) + right settings content. Top-right corner has the macOS traffic-light dots **plus extra icons** (download/grid/split-view). Provider-list entries carry **colored per-provider icons**.
- **Left nav**: window-control dots; items `New Chat` `⌘N`, `New Projects` `⌘P`, `Search` `⌘K`, `Hub`, `Settings` (active) — **keyboard shortcuts ARE shown** next to these items. Sections `Chats` (recent: "Build a PacMan Clone…", "Translate the following…", "interpreter"), `INTEGRATIONS` (`Experimental` tag, `MCP Servers`, `Claude Code`), `MODEL PROVIDERS` (`+` add; `LOCAL`: `Llama.cpp`, `MLX`; `REMOTE`: `OpenAI`, `Azure`, `Anthropic`, `OpenRouter`, `Mistral`, `Groq` (last fully-visible entry), `x.AI` (last entry, **truncated** — only the top ~40% visible; models often render it "xAI")).
- **Right (Settings)**: sections `General` (`App Version` `v0.8.2`; `Automatic Update Check` toggle **on** + button `Check for Updates` **enabled**; `Language` dropdown `English`), `Data Folder` (`App Data` path `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data` + `Change Location`; `App Logs` + `Show in Finder` / `Open Logs`), `Advanced` (`Jan CLI` at `/Users/frederic/.local/bin/jan` + `Uninstall`; `Reset To Factory Settings` + red `Reset` button).

responses.content:
Here’s a terse, structured description of the UI screenshot:

---

## (1) Overall Layout

- **Three-column layout**: Left sidebar (main nav), middle column (settings categories), right panel (settings content).
- **Top bar**: macOS-style traffic lights (red/yellow/green) + download and window controls.
- **Scrollable panels**: All three columns are vertically scrollable.
- **Sections in right panel**: General, Data Folder, Advanced — each with subsections and interactive elements.

---

## (2) Visible Components with Verbatim Text

### Left Sidebar
- New Chat
- New Projects
- Search
- Hub
- Settings
- Chats
- Build a PacMan Clone ...
- Translate the following...
- interpreter

### Middle Column (Settings Categories)
- General
- Appearance
- Assistants
- Attachments
- Local API Server
- HTTPS Proxy
- Shortcuts
- Hardware
- Privacy
- INTEGRATIONS (Experimental)
  - MCP Servers
  - Claude Code
- MODEL PROVIDERS
  - LOCAL
    - Llama.cpp
    - MLX
  - REMOTE
    - OpenAI
    - Azure
    - Anthropic
    - OpenRouter
    - Mistral
    - Groq
    - xAI

### Right Panel
#### General
- App Version: v0.8.2
- Automatic Update Check: [Toggle ON]
  - “Automatically check for updates on startup and periodically.”
- Check for Updates: [Button: “Check for Updates”]
  - “Check if a newer version of Jan is available.”
- Language: [Dropdown: “English”]

#### Data Folder
- App Data: [Button: “Change Location”]
  - Path: `/Users/frederic/Library/Application Support/Jan/data` [Copy icon]
- App Logs: [Button: “Show in Finder”] [Button: “Open Logs”]
  - “View detailed logs of the App.”

#### Advanced
- Jan CLI: [Button: “Uninstall”]
  - “Installed at /Users/frederic/local/bin/jan — use jan from your terminal to serve models.”
- Reset To Factory Settings: [Button: “Reset”]
  - “Restore application to its initial state, erasing all models and chat history. This action is irreversible and recommended only if the application is corrupted.”

---

## (3) Feedback, Status, or Error Messages

- None visible.
- Toggle for “Automatic Update Check” is ON (orange switch).
- “Reset To Factory Settings” has a red “Reset” button — indicates destructive action.
- “Experimental” badge next to “INTEGRATIONS” — suggests feature status.

---

## (4) Interactive Elements and Their State

### Buttons
- [Check for Updates] — disabled/grayed out? (no hover effect shown)
- [Change Location] — likely opens file picker
- [Show in Finder] — opens Finder with path
- [Open Logs] — opens log file
- [Uninstall] — removes Jan CLI
- [Reset] — red, prominent, destructive action

### Inputs/Controls
- [Toggle] — “Automatic Update Check” — currently ON
- [Dropdown] — “Language” — set to “English”
- [Copy icon] — next to data path — copies to clipboard

### Links/Items
- All sidebar items are clickable (navigation)
- “Experimental” tag is non-clickable label
- Model provider list items are clickable (toggle connection?)

---

✅ All components rendered as-is; no hidden or inferred elements.
